purpose: Pin the environment fingerprint format used by every live measurement runner (bd-juvqm.3, bd-8b70o, future tail-evidence harnesses). The fingerprint anchors a LiveMeasurementRow's `environment_fingerprint` field so two p99/p999 measurements can be compared only when they were collected on the same host class. `frankenlibc_harness::system_fingerprint` is the single source of truth for the format, the env override, and the parser.

format.rationale: Four ordered components separated by `-`. The third component must end in `cpu` so callers can robustly distinguish the CPU count from the architecture. The kernel_release component may contain additional `-` characters (`6.1.0-25-amd64-rt`); the parser joins parts[3..] back.

env_override.behavior: If set to a non-empty trimmed string, `environment_fingerprint()` returns that value verbatim, bypassing the detector. Used by CI environments that pin a known-stable fingerprint.
